L1.head: Metamaterial-Enhanced Nonlinear Terahertz Imaging System
L1.claim: 集成超材料与非线性晶体可突破传统成像极限

L1.head: Super-Resolution Imaging
L1.claim: 超分辨率成像可实现3-5倍分辨率提升

L2.head: Metamaterial Lens with Subwavelength Unit Cells
L2.claim: 亚波长单元超材料透镜可预压缩太赫兹光束

L2.head: Terahertz Beam Pre-Compression
L2.claim: 光束预压缩过程引入可控相位延迟

L2.head: Nonlinear Crystal Stage (DSTMS/Organic Crystals)
L2.claim: 非线性晶体阶段实现频率上转换

L2.head: Frequency Upconversion
L2.claim: 频率上转换有效降低工作波长

L3.head: Negative Refractive Index Properties
L3.claim: 负折射率特性补偿太赫兹光谱色差

L3.head: Chromatic Aberrations Compensation
L3.claim: 色差补偿消除色差限制

L3.head: Reduced Operational Wavelength
L3.claim: 工作波长降低缩小衍射极限斑点

L3.head: Diffraction-Limited Spot Size Reduction
L3.claim: 斑点尺寸缩小实现超越衍射极限的分辨率
